articles.title: Trump's 'American Flag Blue' in the Lincoln Memorial pool is already gray — and the Olympic canoer 'vandal' is fighting his arrest - Fortune
articles.description: David Hearn's case is at the center of a $16 million Reflecting Pool fix that's already fading and flaking apart.
articles.content: The newly drained Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pools bottom surface has noticeably faded since it was lined with a protective coating in a color President Donald Trump called American flag blue this s… [+3135 chars]

articles.author: Julian Chokkattu
articles.title: OnePlus, the ‘Flagship-Killer’ Smartphone Brand, Is All but Dead - WIRED
articles.description: The original OnePlus phone disrupted the mobile market 13 years ago with its affordable price and top-end specs. Now, the company is exiting North America and Europe to focus on China.
articles.content: But OnePlus exit comes at a time when smartphone shipments are showing steep declines due to the ongoing memory crisisthe lack of RAM, eaten up by data centers for the AI boom, has caused a global sh… [+3115 chars]

articles.author: Elizabeth Chuck
articles.title: America tried permanent daylight saving time in the 1970s — and hated it - NBC News
articles.description: The idea of halting clock changes is popular and easily passed the House this week. But opponents point out that the last time the federal government tried it, it didn’t go well.
articles.content: More than 50 years ago, President Richard Nixon pitched a year-round extension of daylight saving time as a way to conserve energy, promising the change would cause only a minimum of inconvenience. I… [+258 chars]
